candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortization of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: This is a single total operating D&A line shown separately above EBIT, but it is not labeled as COGS/cost of sales-specific and appears to cover broader operating expenses rather than only the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: A separate D&A row exists, but it is an aggregate operating D&A line and cannot be cleanly attributed to the selected COGS bucket ('Cost of sales') without risking misallocation or double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortization of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: This is a separate operating D&A line above EBIT and outside the selected XSGA component rows, but it is a total D&A line not specifically tied to SG&A/overhead components and may also include COGS-related depreciation.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation and amortization of tangible and intangible assets

variables.notes: The visible D&A row is separate from the selected XSGA component rows, but it is an undifferentiated total operating D&A line. Because it is not clearly SG&A-specific and may span both production and overhead functions, the conservative choice is not to add it automatically.
